dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8824 IH: To repeal the jurisdiction conferred by section 3243 of title 18, United States Code, to the State of Kansas over offenses committed by or against Indians on Tribal lands in Kansas.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Mann introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To repeal the jurisdiction conferred by section 3243 of title 18, United States Code, to the State of Kansas over offenses committed by or against Indians on Tribal lands in Kansas.

section.header: Repeal of State jurisdiction over certain offenses committed on Tribal lands in Kansas
section.text: Section 3243 of title 18, United States Code, is repealed.
